analysis.reasoning: Core message: The author met the European Parliament President after EUCO and stresses that EP support is crucial to deliver reforms, investments, and build a modern, more sustainable Union. Evaluation: EU1 (EU successful story) – not directly; no historical success or overcoming past obstacles is mentioned. EU2 (EU is united) – implied cooperation between Council and Parliament but no explicit claim of unity or agreement; insufficient. EU3 (EU useful for its citizens) – yes: emphasizes delivering reforms and investments to build a modern, sustainable Union within the EU, highlighting practical benefits for Europeans. EU4 (EU avant-garde) – partially suggested by “modern and more sustainable Union,” but lacks explicit leadership/pioneering claims; not strong enough. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – not addressed. EU6 (contributes to a better world) – focus is internal, not global. Conclusion: The tweet promotes EU3.
